message:
test(protocol): add unit tests for ToolAnnotations, Icon, and Content factories [bd-3s7f]

Cover ToolAnnotations builder/serialization/round-trip, Icon::is_data_uri
edge cases, and Content binary factory methods (image_bytes, audio_bytes,
resource_blob_bytes) with base64 encoding verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
